# MuleSoft Amazon EC2 Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.0) of Amazon EC2 Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon EC2 Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-ec2-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon EC2 Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon EC2 Connector 3.0 Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-ec2-connector/latest/amazon-ec2-connector-examples.md)
- [Amazon EC2 Connector 3.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-ec2-connector/latest/amazon-ec2-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Amazon EC2 Connector 3.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-ec2-connector/latest/amazon-ec2-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Amazon EC2 Connector to Version 3.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-ec2-connector/latest/amazon-ec2-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Amazon EC2 Connector 3.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-ec2-connector/latest/amazon-ec2-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon EC2 Connector 3.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-ec2-connector/latest/index.md)
